speaker: ryan
notes: E3-PATH-2 (megakernel-AR) ENABLED — torch.ops.qwen_megakernel_C.decode_embed wired into Decoder.step_embed via step_embed_megakernel (default ON; kill-switch QWEN_USE_MEGAKERNEL_AR=0).
Audio QA gate: Deepgram nova-2 on samples/qa_default_on.wav returned 'Hello. How are you doing today?' at confidence 1.000 — matches the upstream control + pre-swap baseline.

Previous canonical (graphed-PyTorch) was TTFC 23.42 ± 0.03 ms, RTF 0.1813 ± 2.8e-5. Megakernel-AR drops RTF by 20% (crosses Performance tier <0.15) at the cost of +1.9 ms TTFC (still deeply under all three tier ceilings).

RTX 5090 sm_120a, NGC PyTorch 2.10.0a. n=5 + 3 warmup. perf_counter for wall, cuda.synchronize at every timer boundary. Repro: cd /workspace/inference-server && PYTHONPATH=/workspace/qwen_megakernel_modified python3 -u bench_megakernel.py --warmup 3 --timed 5 --skip-decode --out bench_results.json
